task_completion.description: Open the Thunderbird compose window to create a new message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new message window ('Write') in Mozilla Thunderbird is open and visible on the screen.
The Subject field in the compose window contains exactly 'Follow-Up: Product Demo and Next Steps'.

task_completion.description: Enter the required text into the email body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email body contains the expected phrases provided in the privileged information, including the thank you message, catalog mention, follow-up call offer, and the specific signature block.

task_completion.description: Save the message as a template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen navigating to File > Save As > Template, or there is a status/notification indicating the message was saved as a template.

task_completion.description: Verify the template is saved in the Local Folders Templates folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Thunderbird window shows the 'Templates' folder under 'Local Folders' selected, and the newly created template with the correct subject is listed in the folder contents.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Thunderbird GUI (clicking buttons, typing in fields) rather than using terminal commands or scripts to manipulate Thunderbird files directly.
The application being used is clearly Mozilla Thunderbird, not a generic text editor, webmail interface, or other email client.

integrity.description: The agent did not send the email.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent clicking the 'Send' button, and the email does not appear in a 'Sent' folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Subject: 'Follow-Up: Product Demo and Next Steps'. Expected Body Phrases (must be present): 'thank you', 'product demonstration', 'product catalog', 'pricing', 'follow-up call', 'volume pricing', 'delivery timelines', 'Best regards', 'Alex Torres', '555-867-5309'.
